HTML template for testing autoescaping behavior in Flask.

# Purpose
The content defines a template for rendering text and HTML with different autoescape settings in a web application. The `{{ text }}` and `{{ html }}` placeholders are used to insert dynamic content. The `{% autoescape false %}` and `{% autoescape true %}` tags control whether the inserted content is automatically escaped, which affects how special characters are handled in the output.
